title: Key Highlights of Civil Services Examination (CSE) 2025 Results
description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) announced the results of the Civil Services Examination (CSE) 2025 on 06 March 2026 at 4:10 PM in Delhi to select candidates for various civil services positions.

title: UPSC Conducts Civil Services Exam 2025
description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has recommended 958 candidates for appointment to various posts based on the Civil Services Examination 2025 results, following a written examination and interviews from August 2025 to February 2026.

title: Ministry of Rural Development launches VB-G RAM G Youth Digital Campaign
description: The Ministry of Rural Development, in collaboration with MY Bharat, is launching the 'VB-G RAM G Youth Digital Campaign' tomorrow, aiming to digitally empower rural youth through education and training to drive positive change in their communities.

title: Jan Aushadhi Week 2026: Nationwide Free Health Check-up Camps Continue on 4th Day Amid Holi Celebrations
description: The Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Bureau (PMBI) organized health checkup camps across various states and union territories on the fourth day of Jan Aushadhi Week 2026, providing free medical consultations and tests.
department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

title: UPSC to Hold Combined Geo-Scientist (Preliminary) Exam, 2026
description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) announced the results of the Combined Geo-Scientist (Preliminary) Examination, 2026, held on February 8, 2026, qualifying candidates for the Main Examination scheduled for June 20 and 21, 2026.

title: Ministry of Education to Start Online Registrations for Yuva Sangam (6th Phase) from 2nd March 2026
description: The Ministry of Education has launched the online registration portal for Yuva Sangam (Phase VI) under EBSB initiative from March 2, 2026, to strengthen emotional bonds among youth from different states and UTs.

title: Major Upgrade in ITI Training: 150-Hour Mandatory OJT/Group Project Provision Implemented
description: The Government has introduced a provision to improve training in Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs) by providing students with 150 hours of On-the-Job Training (OJT) or Group Projects to gain practical experience and enhance employability.
department: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

title: CBIC Introduces Deferred Duty Payment Facility for Eligible Manufacturer Importers
description: The Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) has launched a new facility for eligible manufacturer importers, offering a deferred payment of customs duty, from April 1, 2026, to March 31, 2028, to improve cash flow and promote compliance.

title: TRAI Issues Consultation Paper on Review of Valuation of Assets for Digital Connectivity Regulations, 2024
description: The Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI) has recently issued a consultation paper on 'Review of Valuation of Assets for Digital Connectivity Regulations, 2024' to promote digital connectivity across India.

title: Union Public Service Commission Engineering Service (Preliminary) Examination, 2026
description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) announced results of the Engineering Services (Preliminary) Examination, 2026, held on February 8, 2026, for candidates who qualified for the Main Examination scheduled for June 21, 2026.
